programs.title: 60 Days In
programs.desc: The participants are tested by thieves and the racial politics of jail, forcing them to become either targets and victims, or threats and aggressors.

programs.title: 60 Days In
programs.desc: David climbs the ranks in the pod and struggles to remember what side he is on; Abner is tested when one of his own commits an offense; the women suspect that they are being unfairly targeted by the DOs.

programs.title: 60 Days In
programs.desc: More than halfway through their time in jail, the participants struggle to make progress on their missions; as pod drama boils over, some hit their breaking point.

programs.title: 60 Days In
programs.desc: With three participants in the jail and two more on their way in, Sheriff Lamb's mission-based program is off to the races.

programs.title: 60 Days In
programs.desc: With all seven participants embedded in the facility, some struggle to maintain their distance from one another; one participant threatens to bring the whole program to an abrupt end.

programs.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programs.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.
